title: Crispy Xenial Pork Ribs with Avgolemono Glaze
description: A twist on traditional Greek cuisine, these crispy pork ribs are smothered in a tangy avgolemono glaze, perfect for a comforting meal.
instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together xenial seasoning blend and olive oil.
Apply the mixture evenly to both sides of the ribs, making sure they are fully coated.
Place the ribs in a single layer on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 2 hours, or until the ribs are tender and easily fall off the bone.
While the ribs are baking, prepare the avgolemono glaze.
In a medium saucepan, combine lemon juice, water, and minced garlic.
Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Remove the ribs from the oven and brush the avgolemono glaze evenly over both sides of the ribs.
Return the ribs to the oven and bake for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the glaze has caramelized.
Remove the ribs from the oven and let them rest for 5 minutes before serving.
